source.note: Snapshot of stable official Pharos Port route links from homepage metadata and app config. Do not hardcode live campaign names; send users to the official campaign route for current information.

summary.title: Pharos Port
summary.description: Your all-in-one entry to earn, interact, and explore on Pharos. Pharos Port is a RealFi hub for campaigns, rewards, staking links, bridge/swap, ramp, ecosystem discovery, and curated real-world assets.

officialRoutes.name: Bridge
officialRoutes.description: Primary official entry for moving funds into Pharos from another network.

officialRoutes.name: Swap
officialRoutes.description: Pharos Port swap route when enabled; otherwise use the ecosystem DEX route such as FaroSwap.

officialRoutes.name: Ramp
officialRoutes.description: Fiat/on-ramp style entry from Pharos Port.

officialRoutes.name: Airdrop Claim
officialRoutes.description: Official claim entry linked from Pharos Port rewards. Check the page for current claim availability.

officialRoutes.name: Campaign
officialRoutes.description: Official Pharos Port campaign route. Use this page as the source of truth for current campaigns.

officialRoutes.name: Campaign Rewards
officialRoutes.description: Official campaign rewards route. Use this page for current reward status and details.

officialRoutes.name: PROS Pixel
officialRoutes.description: Official Pharos pixel art game/activity on Pharos Mainnet. Use this when users ask about games, activities, or PROS Pixel.

officialRoutes.name: Harbor
officialRoutes.description: Curated real-world asset products on Pharos Port when the Harbor feature is available.

officialRoutes.name: PharosScan
officialRoutes.description: Mainnet block explorer for checking wallet transactions, addresses, blocks, tokens, and contract activity on Pharos.

officialRoutes.name: PharosScan Verify Contract
officialRoutes.description: PharosScan page for verifying deployed smart contract source code on Pharos mainnet.

officialRoutes.name: Staking
officialRoutes.description: Staking route referenced in Pharos Port app config. Verify live product support and contract details before staking.

officialRoutes.name: Nodes
officialRoutes.description: Nodes route referenced in Pharos Port app config.

officialRoutes.name: Docs
officialRoutes.description: Official Pharos documentation. Send users here when they ask for docs, technical references, or setup guides.
